protein_name: Protein kinase involved in the transduction of mitogenic signals from the cell membrane to the nucleus. May play a role in the postsynaptic responses of hippocampal neuron. Phosphorylates MAP2K1, and thereby contributes to the MAP kinase signal transduction pathway. Belongs to the protein kinase superfamily. TKL Ser/Thr protein kinase family. RAF subfamily. Brain and testis. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
